interviewProcess: Recruiter Phone Screen (to assess basic qualifications and fit)
Technical Phone Interview (1-2 rounds, focused on Data Structures & Algorithms)
Onsite Interviews (4-5 rounds, including multiple DSA/coding, System Design, and Behavioral/Leadership Principles)
systemDesignTopics: Design a highly available and scalable photo sharing service
Design an Apple Maps routing service
behavioralQuestions: Tell me about a time you faced a significant technical challenge and how you overcame it.
Describe a project where you had to influence stakeholders without direct authority.
How do you handle disagreements with team members or managers?
Why Apple? What excites you about this role and our products?
Tell me about a time you failed or made a mistake. What did you learn from it?
